subject: vocabulary
title: Correct the mistakes
instruction: Correct the mistakes in these sentences.

questions.text: The chart talks us how many students were studying in the college in 1990.
I can't understand what he is speaking. He's almost incoherent.
Today I'm going to tell about my last holiday in America.
I can talk three languages fluently, but Italian is my mother tongue.
I learned English from a textbook, so I don't really understand it when it is said.
The table says the percentage of people moving into urban areas between 1960 and 1990.
